docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JUN-04-2013 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHARLES Y SETO AKA CHARLES SETO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-12-2012

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-04-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
